landing.heroEyebrow: Every photographers with a story to tell
landing.heroSubtitle: From prologue to epilogue, your story begins here.
landing.betaBadge: Free beta coming soon · No credit card required
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to tell your story
landing.feature1Desc: Every photo has a place in your story. Arrange them into chapters, give them order and meaning — and watch your narrative take shape.
landing.feature2Desc: Rate photos with stars and color labels, filter by folder, and find exactly what you need in seconds.
landing.feature3Desc: racconto.app/p/yourname — a shareable portfolio link anyone can view without logging in.
landing.feature4Desc: Write memos, concepts, and research in Markdown. Connect notes to individual photos to preserve the context behind your work.
landing.feature5Title: Even faster with the desktop app
landing.feature5Desc: Connect a local folder on macOS or Windows and photos upload automatically the moment you save them — no Lightroom, no cables needed.
landing.betaDesc: All features available during the free beta. No credit card required.
landing.betaLimit: Beta limits: 3 projects · 1,000 photos in total
landing.desktopOptimizationDesc: Racconto is optimized for desktop environments.

feature.featureDetailDesc: Everything you need to craft your story and bring meaning to your photos, all in one place
feature.feature1DetailDesc: Create chapters and weave photos together to complete your narrative. Drag and drop to reorder photos, and document chapter details.
feature.feature2DetailDesc: Native macOS and Windows apps are supported. Link a local folder, and the app will automatically detect and upload new photos every time it launches.
feature.feature3DetailDesc: Enjoy a free-form note-taking feature. Keep your shooting ideas, concepts, and research in one place, and leave memos linked to individual photos. Fully supports Markdown formatting.
feature.feature4DetailDesc: Categorize photos with color labels and star ratings, and automatically extract EXIF data. Conveniently sort through hundreds of photos.
feature.feature5DetailDesc: Publish your projects and set a username to customize your personal portfolio. Share your portfolio using your unique URL (/p/username).

electron.localFolderConnectInfo: Added / deleted files from the connected folder will be automatically found.
